name: First State Bank And Trust Company, Inc.
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank serving Southeast Missouri since 1934, offering personal, business, and agricultural banking with local decision-making and 7 branch locations.
description_long: First State Bank & Trust Co., Inc. is a locally-owned and operated community bank headquartered in Southeast Missouri that has served residents and businesses for over 90 years, founding in 1934. The bank operates 7 branch locations across the Bootheel region including Caruthersville, Sikeston, Dexter, Charleston, Hayti, Portageville, and Matthews, and is FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, CDs, debit cards, personal loans, home purchase mortgages, auto and vehicle loans, credit cards, and digital banking services. For business customers, FSBT provides business checking, business credit cards, merchant services, digital invoicing, commercial loans, agricultural lending, and cash management services. The bank recently announced the acquisition of Senath State Bank, expanding its service area. FSBT distinguishes itself as a relationship-based community bank where "bankers know your name" and local credit decisions are made on local needs. The bank emphasizes that customer deposits support loans to local families and businesses within the region. They offer digital banking through their "1View" platform, financial education resources, scam protection education, and customer benefits including Club Rewards (up to $40 cashback), eStatements, and My Credit score monitoring tools. As a traditional brick-and-mortar community bank, FSBT is best suited for customers prioritizing personal relationships with local bankers and community reinvestment. The main limitation is geographic service area restricted to Southeast Missouri, making them inaccessible for customers outside their 7-branch footprint. Customers seeking specialized fintech features or aggressive rewards programs may find more competitive offerings elsewhere.
pros: FDIC-insured with 90+ year operating history and local ownership structure
Local credit decisions made by bankers who know customers personally by name
7 physical branch locations plus ATM network for in-person banking access
Comprehensive product suite including personal, business, and agricultural lending
Club Rewards program offering up to $40 cashback on everyday purchases
Free financial education and active scam protection education for customers
Digital banking platform (1View) with credit score monitoring included
cons: Geographic limitation: serves only 7 locations in Southeast Missouri; not available nationally or online-only
Limited information on website regarding specific APRs, fees, or deposit rate competitiveness
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or advanced commercial banking products
Mobile app availability mentioned but no detailed feature comparison with larger national banks
Acquisition of Senath State Bank is recent; integration details and impact unclear
best_for: Families and individuals in Southeast Missouri seeking relationship-based community banking with local decision-making
Small businesses and farms in the Bootheel region needing agricultural lending and commercial services
Customers prioritizing personal banker relationships and community reinvestment over digital-first banking
diagnosis: First State Bank & Trust is best for customers in Southeast Missouri who value personal relationships with local bankers and want their deposits to support community lending. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to 7 branch locations in the Bootheel region, making this unsuitable for customers outside Missouri or those requiring online-only banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
